title: A godly man is the same man in every room
caption:
The church version. The gym version. The version at 2 a.m. when no one is watching.

Most men are running all three. The gap between them is not a quirk. It is a crack in the foundation.

Integrity doesn't mean you never fall. It means the version of you that falls is the same man who gets back up. You confess to the same men who saw you at your best. You're not managing a reputation. You're building a character.

Pick the room where you're most different. The mask room. Where you perform instead of live. Bring one man into it this week. The hidden life shrinks when it has a witness.

"Whoever can be trusted with very little can also be trusted with much." Luke 16:10

Save this and send it to the man who's running too many versions of himself.

#faith #integrity #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #realtalk #accountability #christianity
